TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sa'aniwan, title = Sa'aniwan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sa'aniwan} }

S.FORM: alang Sa'aniwan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 153 buwan, 303 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 275 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 28 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 86%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Sa'aniwan hya' ga Tomiyac. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Sa'aniwan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Sa'aniwan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 153 buwan, 303 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 275 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 28 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 86%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Sa'aniwan hya' ga Tomiyac. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Sa'aniwan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕaʔaniwan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ʦ~ʨinkoŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕaʔaniwan ħjaʔ ɣa tomijaʦ~ʨ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan alaŋ s~ɕaʔaniwan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
